privileged_info_summary: All four publication dates in the task metadata are verified as accurate: (1) Watson & Crick's 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids' was published April 25, 1953 in Nature Vol. 171; (2) LeCun, Bengio & Hinton's 'Deep Learning' review was published May 28, 2015 in Nature Vol. 521; (3) Vaswani et al.'s 'Attention Is All You Need' was released June 12, 2017 via arXiv and NIPS 2017; (4) Silver et al.'s 'Mastering the Game of Go' was published January 28, 2016 in Nature Vol. 529. All dates match the expected values specified in the task's metadata targets field.
